jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - Craftsvilla - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
Craftsvilla invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Marketplace Manager at our Varanasi location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Craftsvilla:
Craftsvilla is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Data Analytics

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Life and accident insurance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Craftsvilla!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
